functions.body: local timeout="${1:-$GROQBASH_LOCK_TIMEOUT_HISTORY}";local dir="${GROQBASH_HISTORY_DIR:-$PWD/groqbash.d/history}";local max_files="${GROQBASH_HISTORY_MAX_FILES:-100}";local max_bytes="${GROQBASH_HISTORY_MAX_BYTES:-104857600}";local keep_days="${GROQBASH_HISTORY_KEEP_DAYS:-90}";mapfile -t old_files < <(find "$dir" -type f -mtime +"$keep_days" 2>/dev/null);if [ "${#old_files[@]}" -gt 0 ]; then for f in "${old_files[@]}"; do lock_exec "$HISTORY_LOCK" "$timeout" -- sh -c 'rm -f -- "$1"' _ "$f"; done; fi;while :; do mapfile -t entries < <(find "$dir" -type f -printf "%T@|%s|%p\n" 2>/dev/null | sort -n);local total=0;local line mtime size path;for line in "${entries[@]}"; do IFS='|' read -r mtime size path <<< "$line";total=$((total + size));done;[ "$total" -le "$max_bytes" ] && break;IFS='|' read -r _ _ oldest <<< "${entries[0]}";lock_exec "$HISTORY_LOCK" "$timeout" -- sh -c 'rm -f -- "$1"' _ "$oldest";done;while :; do mapfile -t entries < <(find "$dir" -type f -printf "%T@ %p\n" 2>/dev/null | sort -n);local count="${#entries[@]}";[ "$count" -le "$max_files" ] && break;oldest="$(echo "${entries[0]}" | awk '{print $2}')";lock_exec "$HISTORY_LOCK" "$timeout" -- sh -c 'rm -f -- "$1"' _ "$oldest";done;return 0

local content="$1";local filename;filename="$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)-groq-output-$$.txt";mkdir -p "$GROQBASH_HISTORY_DIR" 2>/dev/null || true;local tmpf dest lockfile;tmpf="$(_tmpf file  "$GROQBASH_HISTORY_DIR" groq-out 2>/dev/null)";if [ -z "$tmpf" ]; then log_error "HISTORYFAIL" "save_to_history: cannot allocate tmp file in $GROQBASH_HISTORY_DIR";return "$GROQBASHERRTMP";fi;if ! printf '%s\n' "$content" > "$tmpf" 2>/dev/null; then rm -f -- "$tmpf" 2>/dev/null || true;log_error "HISTORYFAIL" "save_to_history: cannot write tmp file $tmpf";return "$GROQBASHERRTMP";fi;dest="$GROQBASH_HISTORY_DIR/$filename";lockfile="$HISTORY_LOCK";if ! lock_exec "$lockfile" "$GROQBASH_LOCK_TIMEOUT_HISTORY" -- sh -c 'set -e; mv -f -- "$1" "$2"; chmod 600 "$2" 2>/dev/null || true' _ "$tmpf" "$dest"; then rc=$?;rm -f -- "$tmpf" 2>/dev/null || true;return "$rc";fi;if [ -f "$dest" ]; then local size_bytes ts base history_json;size_bytes="$(file_size  "$dest" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)";ts="$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)";base="$(basename  "$dest")";history_json="$(jq -c -n --arg path "$dest" --arg base "$base" --arg ts "$ts" --argjson size "$size_bytes" '{saved:true, path:$path, basename:$base, ts:$ts, size_bytes:$size}')";ui_state_write "last_history.json" "$history_json" || log_warn "UI_STATE" "failed to write last_history.json";else local ts history_json;ts="$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)";history_json="$(jq -c -n --arg ts "$ts" '{saved:false, ts:$ts}')";ui_state_write "last_history.json" "$history_json" || true;fi;if [ "${GROQBASH_ROTATE_HISTORY:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then rotate_history "$GROQBASH_LOCK_TIMEOUT_HISTORY" || true;fi;if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then log_info "HISTORY_SAVE" "$dest";fi;return 0

local manifest="$1";local timeout="${2:-$GROQBASH_LOCK_TIMEOUT_MODELS}";mkdir -p "$(dirname "$manifest")" 2>/dev/null || { log_error "MANIFESTFAIL" "manifest_create: cannot create dir"; return 1; };lock_exec "${manifest}.lock" "$timeout" -- sh -c 'set -e; manifest="$1"; tmp="$(mktemp "$(dirname "$manifest")/manifest.tmp.XXXX")"; printf "%s" "{\"parts\":[]}" > "$tmp"; if [ -n "${B64_WRAP_OPT:-}" ]; then base64 ${B64_WRAP_OPT} "$tmp" > "${manifest}.b64"; else base64 "$tmp" | tr -d "\n" > "${manifest}.b64"; fi; mv -f "$tmp" "$manifest"; chmod 600 "$manifest" 2>/dev/null || true' _ "$manifest";return $?

local manifest="$1" name="$2" file_path="$3" mime="$4" timeout="${5:-$GROQBASH_LOCK_TIMEOUT_MODELS}";[ -f "$file_path" ] || { log_error "MANIFESTFAIL" "manifest_add_part: file not found: $file_path"; return 1; };mkdir -p "$(dirname "$manifest")" 2>/dev/null || true;lockfile="${manifest}.lock";local destdir part_b64 tmpstamp tmp_part;destdir="$(dirname "$manifest")";tmpstamp="$(date +%s)-$$";part_b64="$destdir/parts-$(basename "$file_path").${tmpstamp}.b64";tmp_part="$(_tmpf file "$GROQBASH_TMPDIR" part 2>/dev/null)" || { log_error "TMP" "manifest_add_part: _tmpf failed for GROQBASH_TMPDIR"; return 1; };if ! b64encode < "$file_path" > "$tmp_part"; then rm -f "$tmp_part" 2>/dev/null || true;log_error "B64FAIL" "manifest_add_part: b64 encode failed";return 1;fi;mv -f "$tmp_part" "$part_b64" 2>/dev/null || { rm -f "$tmp_part" 2>/dev/null || true; log_error "MANIFESTFAIL" "cannot move staged part to $part_b64"; return 1; };chmod 600 "$part_b64" 2>/dev/null || true;lock_exec "$lockfile" "$timeout" -- sh -c 'set -e; manifest="$1"; part_b64="$2"; name="$3"; mime="$4"; tmp="$(mktemp "$(dirname "$manifest")/manifest.edit.XXXX")"; if [ -f "${manifest}.b64" ]; then base64 ${B64_DECODE_OPT} < "${manifest}.b64" > "$tmp" 2>/dev/null || printf "%s" "{\"parts\":[]}" > "$tmp"; elif [ -f "$manifest" ]; then cp -f "$manifest" "$tmp"; else printf "%s" "{\"parts\":[]}" > "$tmp"; fi; jq --arg name "$name" --arg path "$part_b64" --arg enc "b64" --arg type "$mime" ".parts += [{name:\$name, path:\$part_b64, encoding:\$enc, type:\$type}]" "$tmp" > "${tmp}.new"; mv -f "${tmp}.new" "$tmp"; if [ -n "${B64_WRAP_OPT:-}" ]; then base64 ${B64_WRAP_OPT} "$tmp" > "${manifest}.b64"; else base64 "$tmp" | tr -d "\n" > "${manifest}.b64"; fi; cp -f "$tmp" "$manifest"; chmod 600 "$manifest" 2>/dev/null || true; rm -f "$tmp" 2>/dev/null || true' _ "$manifest" "$part_b64" "$name" "$mime" || { log_error "MANIFESTFAIL" "manifest_add_part: update failed"; return 1; };if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then log_info "MANIFEST_ADD" "added part $name -> $part_b64";fi;return 0
local manifest="$1";if [ -f "$manifest" ]; then cat "$manifest";return 0;fi;if [ -f "${manifest}.b64" ]; then b64decode < "${manifest}.b64";return $?;fi;return 1

local path="$1" perm="";case "$(uname 2>/dev/null || echo Linux)" in Darwin) perm="$(stat -f %Sp "$path" 2>/dev/null || true)";;;*) if command -v stat >/dev/null 2>&1; then perm="$(stat -c %A "$path" 2>/dev/null || true)";elif command -v ls >/dev/null 2>&1; then perm="$(ls -ld -- "$path" 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}' || true)";fi;;esac;printf '%s' "$perm"

local path="$1" owner="";case "$(uname 2>/dev/null || echo Linux)" in Darwin) owner="$(stat -f %Su "$path" 2>/dev/null || true)";;;*) if command -v stat >/dev/null 2>&1; then owner="$(stat -c %U "$path" 2>/dev/null || true)";elif command -v ls >/dev/null 2>&1; then owner="$(ls -ld -- "$path" 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $3}' || true)";fi;;esac;printf '%s' "$owner"

local path="$1";local hash="" stat_out="" dev="" inode="" size="" ctime="" mtime="" uid="" gid="" mode="";[ -f "$path" ] || { printf ''; return 0; };local use_hash="${GROQBASH_SIG_HASH:-1}";if [ "${use_hash}" != "0" ] && command -v sha256sum >/dev/null 2>&1; then hash="$(sha256sum "$path" 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}' || true)";else hash="";fi;case "$(uname 2>/dev/null || echo Linux)" in Darwin) stat_out="$(stat -f '%d %i %z %c %m %u %g %p' "$path" 2>/dev/null || true)";;;*) stat_out="$(stat -c '%d %i %s %Z %Y %u %g %a' "$path" 2>/dev/null || true)";;;esac;if [ -z "${stat_out:-}" ]; then dev=""; inode=""; size=""; ctime=""; mtime=""; uid=""; gid=""; mode="";else read -r dev inode size ctime mtime uid gid mode <<EOF
$stat_out
EOF
if [ -z "${dev:-}" ] && [ -z "${inode:-}" ] && [ -z "${size:-}" ]; then dev=""; inode=""; size=""; ctime=""; mtime=""; uid=""; gid=""; mode="";fi;fi;printf '%s|%s|%s|%s|%s|%s|%s|%s|%s' "${hash:-}" "${dev:-}" "${inode:-}" "${size:-}" "${ctime:-}" "${mtime:-}" "${uid:-}" "${gid:-}" "${mode:-}"
_get_file_signature "$1"

local d="$1" perms others_write;[ -d "$d" ] || return "$GROQBASHERRTMP";perms="$(_get_perm_string "$d")";[ -z "$perms" ] && return "$GROQBASHERRTMP";others_write="$(printf '%s' "$perms" | awk '{print substr($0,9,1)}')";[ "$others_write" = "w" ]

umask 077;local tmpd lockfile;lockfile="$TMP_LOCK";mkdir -p "$GROQBASH_TMPDIR" 2>/dev/null || return "$GROQBASHERRTMP";chmod 700 "$GROQBASH_TMPDIR" 2>/dev/null || true;lock_exec "$lockfile" "$GROQBASH_LOCK_TIMEOUT_TMP" -- sh -c 'set -e; base="$1"; tmpd="$(_tmpf dir "$base" groq 2>/dev/null)" || { log_error "TMP" "make_tmpdir: _tmpf failed for base=$base"; exit "$GROQBASHERRTMP"; }; printf "%s" "$tmpd"' _ "$GROQBASH_TMPDIR";return $?

local mode="$1" base="$2" prefix="${3:-groq}" tmp;if [ -z "$mode" ]; then log_error "TMP" "_tmpf usage: _tmpf <file|dir> <base_dir> [prefix]";return "$GROQBASHERRTMP";fi;if [ -z "${GROQBASH_TMPDIR:-}" ]; then log_error "TMP" "_tmpf: GROQBASH_TMPDIR not set";return "$GROQBASHERRTMP";fi;if [ ! -d "$GROQBASH_TMPDIR" ]; then log_error "TMP" "_tmpf: GROQBASH_TMPDIR does not exist: $GROQBASH_TMPDIR";return "$GROQBASHERRTMP";fi;if [ -L "$GROQBASH_TMPDIR" ]; then log_error "TMP" "_tmpf: GROQBASH_TMPDIR is a symlink: $GROQBASH_TMPDIR";return "$GROQBASHERRTMP";fi;chmod 700 "$GROQBASH_TMPDIR" 2>/dev/null || true;if [ -z "$base" ] || [ ! -d "$base" ]; then base="$GROQBASH_TMPDIR";fi;case "$base" in "$GROQBASH_TMPDIR"/*|"$GROQBASH_TMPDIR") :;;*) base="$GROQBASH_TMPDIR";;esac;umask 077;if [ "$mode" = "file" ]; then tmp="$(mktemp "$base/${prefix}.XXXX" 2>/dev/null || true)";if [ -z "$tmp" ]; then log_error "TMP" "_tmpf: mktemp failed for file in $base";return "$GROQBASH_TMPDIR";fi;chmod 600 "$tmp" 2>/dev/null || true;printf '%s' "$tmp";return 0;elif [ "$mode" = "dir" ]; then tmp="$(mktemp -d "$base/${prefix}.XXXX" 2>/dev/null || true)";if [ -z "$tmp" ]; then log_error "TMP" "_tmpf: mktemp failed for dir in $base";return "$GROQBASHERRTMP";fi;chmod 700 "$tmp" 2>/dev/null || true;printf '%s' "$tmp";return 0;else log_error "TMP" "_tmpf: unknown mode: $mode";return "$GROQBASHERRTMP";fi
local id="$1";if [ -z "$id" ]; then return 1; fi;if printf '%s' "$id" | grep -qE '^[A-Za-z0-9._-]{1,128}$'; then return 0; else return 1; fi
date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ
local sid="$1";ensure_run_tmpdir || return 1;printf '%s' "$RUN_TMPDIR/session-${sid}-messages.json"

local cmd="$1";local sanitized;sanitized="$(printf '%s' "$cmd" | sed -E 's/[A-Za-z0-9_]+=([^[:space:]]+)//g' | sed -E 's/(token|key|secret)[^[:space:]]*/[REDACTED]/Ig' )";printf '%s' "$(printf '%s' "$sanitized" | cut -c1-256)"

local sid="$1" n="${2:-10}" out="$3";local history_dir="${GROQBASH_HISTORY_DIR:-$PWD/groqbash.d/history}";local session_file="$history_dir/sessions/${sid}.ndjson";local tmpdir="${RUN_TMPDIR:-${GROQBASH_TMPDIR:-$PWD/groqbash.d/tmp}}";local tmpf out_tmp line role content role_norm role_json content_json;[ -n "$sid" ] || return 1;[ -n "$out" ] || return 1;mkdir -p "${history_dir%/}/sessions" 2>/dev/null || true;chmod 700 "${history_dir%/}/sessions" 2>/dev/null || true;if ! printf '%s' "$n" | grep -qE '^[0-9]+$'; then n=10; fi;if [ "$n" -le 0 ]; then n=10; fi;mkdir -p "${tmpdir%/}" 2>/dev/null || true;chmod 700 "${tmpdir%/}" 2>/dev/null || true;if ! : > "${tmpdir%/}/.groqbash_tmp_check" 2>/dev/null; then if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then printf 'DEBUG: session_read_window: tmpdir not writable: %s
' "$tmpdir" >&2; fi;return 1;else rm -f "${tmpdir%/}/.groqbash_tmp_check" 2>/dev/null || true;fi;tmpf="$(_tmpf file "$tmpdir" session.read 2>/dev/null)" || { if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then printf 'DEBUG: session_read_window: cannot create tmpf
' >&2; fi; return 1; };if [ -f "$session_file" ]; then lock_exec "${session_file}.lock" 5 -- sh -c 'set -e; session_file="$1"; n="$2"; tmpf="$3"; if grep -q "^$" "$session_file" 2>/dev/null; then awk -v n="$n" "BEGIN{RS=""; ORS=RS} {rec[++c]=\$0} END{start=c-n+1; if(start<1) start=1; for(i=start;i<=c;i++) print rec[i]}" "$session_file" > "$tmpf" 2>/dev/null || cp -f "$session_file" "$tmpf" 2>/dev/null || true; else if ! tail -n "$n" "$session_file" 2>/dev/null > "$tmpf"; then cp -f "$session_file" "$tmpf" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; fi' _ "$session_file" "$n" "$tmpf";else if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then printf 'DEBUG: session_read_window: session file not found: %s
' "$session_file" >&2; fi;fi;out_tmp="$(_tmpf file "$(dirname "$out")" out.tmp 2>/dev/null)" || { if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then printf 'DEBUG: session_read_window: cannot create out_tmp
' >&2; fi; return 1; };mkdir -p "$(dirname "$out")" 2>/dev/null || true;: > "$out_tmp";chmod 600 "$out_tmp" 2>/dev/null || true;printf '%s' '{"messages":[' >> "$out_tmp";local first=1;if jq -c . "$tmpf" >/dev/null 2>&1; then jq -c . "$tmpf" 2>/dev/null | while IFS= read -r line || [ -n "$line" ]; do role="$(printf '%s' "$line" | jq -r '.role // "user"')";case "$role" in user|assistant|system) role_norm="$role" ;; *) role_norm="user" ;; esac;content="$(printf '%s' "$line" | jq -r '.content // ""')";role_json="$(printf '%s' "$role_norm" | jq -R -c '.')";content_json="$(printf '%s' "$content" | jq -R -s '.')";if [ "$first" -eq 0 ]; then printf ',' >> "$out_tmp"; fi;printf '%s' "{"role":${role_json},"content":${content_json}}" >> "$out_tmp" 2>/dev/null || true;first=0;done;else while IFS= read -r line || [ -n "$line" ]; do if printf '%s' "$line" | jq -e . >/dev/null 2>&1; then role="$(printf '%s' "$line" | jq -r '.role // "user"')";case "$role" in user|assistant|system) role_norm="$role" ;; *) role_norm="user" ;; esac;content="$(printf '%s' "$line" | jq -r '.content // ""')";role_json="$(printf '%s' "$role_norm" | jq -R -c '.')";content_json="$(printf '%s' "$content" | jq -R -s '.')";if [ "$first" -eq 0 ]; then printf ',' >> "$out_tmp"; fi;printf '%s' "{"role":${role_json},"content":${content_json}}" >> "$out_tmp" 2>/dev/null || true;first=0;fi;done < "$tmpf";fi;printf '%s' ']}' >> "$out_tmp";if mv -f "$out_tmp" "$out" 2>/dev/null; then :;else cp -f "$out_tmp" "$out" 2>/dev/null || true;rm -f "$out_tmp" 2>/dev/null || true;fi;rm -f "$tmpf" 2>/dev/null || true;chmod 600 "$out" 2>/dev/null || true;if [ -n "$sid" ]; then if ensure_run_tmpdir >/dev/null 2>&1; then msg_count=0;last_ts="";if [ -f "$session_file" ]; then msg_count="$(wc -l < "$session_file" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)";last_line="$(tail -n 1 "$session_file" 2>/dev/null || true)";if printf '%s' "$last_line" | jq -e . >/dev/null 2>&1; then last_ts="$(printf '%s' "$last_line" | jq -r '.ts // empty' 2>/dev/null || true)";fi;fi;meta_json="$(jq -c -n --arg id "$sid" --argjson msg_count "$msg_count" --arg last_ts "${last_ts:-}" '{id:$id, active:(( $msg_count | tonumber) > 0), msg_count:$msg_count, last_ts:$last_ts}')";ui_state_write "sessions/${sid}.json" "$meta_json" || log_warn "UI_STATE" "failed to update session meta for $sid (read_window)";fi;fi;if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then printf 'DEBUG: session_read_window done: out=%s size=%s tmpf=%s
' "$out" "$( [ -f "$out" ] && wc -c < "$out" || echo 0 )" "$tmpf" >&2;fi;return 0

local sid="$1" role="$2" content="$3" meta_json="$4";local base_sessions_dir="${SESSION_DIR:-${GROQBASH_HISTORY_DIR:-./groqbash.d}/sessions}";local session_file="${base_sessions_dir%/}/${sid}.ndjson";local lockfile="${session_file}.lock";local invocation_ts message_id marker normalized rand tmpf found=0 role_norm line timeout;local marker_dir created_marker=0 sess_dir tmp_init;[ -n "$sid" ] || return 1;[ -n "$content" ] || content="";trap 'if [ "${created_marker:-0}" -eq 1 ] && [ -n "${marker_dir:-}" ]; then rm -rf -- "$marker_dir" 2>/dev/null || true; fi' RETURN;invocation_ts="$(session_now_ts)";message_id="$(printf '%s' "$meta_json" | jq -r '.id // empty' 2>/dev/null || true)";if [ -z "$message_id" ]; then normalized="$(printf '%s' "$content" | sed -e 's/$//' -e 's/
/
/g' | awk '{$1=$1; print}')";rand="$(printf '%04x' $((RANDOM & 0xFFFF)))";if command -v sha256sum >/dev/null 2>&1; then message_id="$(printf '%s|%s|%s' "$normalized" "$invocation_ts" "$rand" | sha256sum | cut -c1-16)";elif command -v openssl >/dev/null 2>&1; then message_id="$(printf '%s|%s|%s' "$normalized" "$invocation_ts" "$rand" | openssl dgst -sha256 | awk '{print $2}' | cut -c1-16)";else message_id="$rand";fi;fi;sess_dir="$(dirname "$session_file")";if ! mkdir -p "$sess_dir" 2>/dev/null; then log_error "SESSION" "cannot create session directory: $sess_dir";return 1;fi;chmod 700 "$sess_dir" 2>/dev/null || true;if [ ! -f "$session_file" ]; then tmp_init="$(_tmpf file  "${RUN_TMPDIR:-$GROQBASH_TMPDIR}" session.init 2>/dev/null)" || true;: > "${tmp_init:-/dev/null}" 2>/dev/null || true;if ! mv -f "$tmp_init" "$session_file" 2>/dev/null; then cp -f "$tmp_init" "$session_file" 2>/dev/null || true;fi;chmod 600 "$session_file" 2>/dev/null || true;fi;if [ -n "${message_id:-}" ]; then marker_dir="${RUN_TMPDIR:-$GROQBASH_TMPDIR}/session-msg-${message_id}.lockdir";if mkdir "$marker_dir" 2>/dev/null; then printf '%s
' "$$" > "${marker_dir}/owner.pid" 2>/dev/null || true;printf '%s
' "$(date +%s)" > "${marker_dir}/owner.ts" 2>/dev/null || true;chmod 700 "$marker_dir" 2>/dev/null || true;created_marker=1;else if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then log_info "SESSION" "append skipped: marker exists for message_id $message_id";fi;return 0;fi;else marker_dir="${RUN_TMPDIR:-$GROQBASH_TMPDIR}/run-$$-${RANDOM}.lockdir";mkdir -p "$marker_dir" 2>/dev/null || true;printf '%s
' "$$" > "${marker_dir}/owner.pid" 2>/dev/null || true;printf '%s
' "$(date +%s)" > "${marker_dir}/owner.ts" 2>/dev/null || true;chmod 700 "$marker_dir" 2>/dev/null || true;created_marker=1;fi;tmpf="$(_tmpf file  "${RUN_TMPDIR:-$GROQBASH_TMPDIR}" session.append 2>/dev/null)" || true;: > "${tmpf:-/dev/null}" 2>/dev/null || true;timeout="${GROQBASH_LOCK_TIMEOUT_HISTORY:-10}";exec 200>"$lockfile" 2>/dev/null || true;if ! flock -x -w "$timeout" 200 2>/dev/null; then if [ "${created_marker:-0}" -eq 1 ] && [ -n "${marker_dir:-}" ]; then rm -rf -- "$marker_dir" 2>/dev/null || true;fi;exec 200>&- 2>/dev/null || true;rm -f "$tmpf" 2>/dev/null || true;log_error "SESSION" "could not acquire session lock for append";return 1;fi;if [ -n "${message_id:-}" ] && [ -f "$session_file" ]; then if grep -F ""id":"$message_id"" "$session_file" >/dev/null 2>/dev/null; then flock -u 200 2>/dev/null || true;exec 200>&- 2>/dev/null || true;rm -f "$tmpf" 2>/dev/null || true;if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then log_info "SESSION" "append skipped: duplicate detected for message_id $message_id";fi;return 0;fi;fi;meta_json="$(printf '%s' "$meta_json" | jq -c '.' 2>/dev/null || printf '%s' '{}' )";case "$role" in user|assistant|system) role_norm="$role" ;; *) role_norm="user" ;; esac;if [ "$role_norm" = "user" ] && [ -z "${content:-}" ]; then if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then log_info "SESSION" "skipping append of empty user message for session $sid";fi;trap - RETURN;return 0;fi;line="$(jq -c -n --arg ts "$invocation_ts" --arg role "$role_norm" --arg content "$content" --argjson meta "$meta_json" '{ts:$ts, role:$role, content:$content, meta:$meta}')";if ! printf "%s
" "$line" >> "$session_file" 2>/dev/null; then : > "$session_file" 2>/dev/null || true;if ! printf "%s
" "$line" >> "$session_file" 2>/dev/null; then if [ "${created_marker:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then rm -rf -- "$marker_dir" 2>/dev/null || true;fi;flock -u 200 2>/dev/null || true;exec 200>&- 2>/dev/null || true;rm -f "$tmpf" 2>/dev/null || true;log_error "SESSION" "failed to append message to $session_file";return 1;fi;fi;chmod 600 "$session_file" 2>/dev/null || true;flock -u 200 2>/dev/null || true;exec 200>&- 2>/dev/null || true;rm -f "$tmpf" 2>/dev/null || true;touch "${marker_dir}/done" 2>/dev/null || true;trap - RETURN;if ensure_run_tmpdir >/dev/null 2>&1; then msg_count=0;last_ts="";if [ -f "$session_file" ]; then msg_count="$(wc -l < "$session_file" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)";last_line="$(tail -n 1 "$session_file" 2>/dev/null || true)";if printf '%s' "$last_line" | jq -e . >/dev/null 2>&1; then last_ts="$(printf '%s' "$last_line" | jq -r '.ts // empty' 2>/dev/null || true)";fi;fi;meta_json="$(jq -c -n --arg id "$sid" --argjson msg_count "$msg_count" --arg last_ts "${last_ts:-}" '{id:$id, active:true, msg_count:$msg_count, last_ts:$last_ts}')";ui_state_write "sessions/${sid}.json" "$meta_json" || log_warn "UI_STATE" "failed to write session meta for $sid";idx_file="${GROQBASH_CONFIG_DIR%/}/ui_state/sessions/index.json";if [ -f "$idx_file" ]; then if jq -e --arg sid "$sid" '(.sessions // []) | index($sid) // empty' "$idx_file" >/dev/null 2>&1; then :;else tmp_idx="$(_tmpf file  "${RUN_TMPDIR:-$GROQBASH_TMPDIR}" uiidx 2>/dev/null)" || true;if [ -n "$tmp_idx" ]; then jq --arg sid "$sid" '.sessions = ((.sessions // []) + [$sid])' "$idx_file" > "${tmp_idx}.new" 2>/dev/null && mv -f "${tmp_idx}.new" "$tmp_idx" && ui_state_write "sessions/index.json" "$(cat "$tmp_idx")" || true;rm -f "$tmp_idx" 2>/dev/null || true;fi;fi;else ui_state_write "sessions/index.json" "$(jq -c -n --argjson arr '[]' '{sessions:[]}' )" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true;ui_state_write "sessions/index.json" "$(jq -c -n --arg sid "$sid" '{sessions:[$sid]}' )" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true;fi;fi;if [ "${DEBUG:-0}" -eq 1 ]; then log_info "SESSION" "appended message id ${message_id:-<no-id>} to $session_file";fi;return 0

local s="$1" h="";if command -v sha256sum >/dev/null 2>&1; then h="$(printf '%s'  "$s" | sha256sum 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}' || true)";elif command -v openssl >/dev/null 2>&1; then h="$(printf '%s'  "$s" | openssl dgst -sha256 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $2}' || true)";else h="$(printf '%s'  "$s" | base64 | tr -d '\n' | cut -c1-64)";fi;printf '%s' "${h:-}"
local sid="$1" params="$2";[ -n "$sid" ] || return 1;params="${params:-}";printf '%s|%s' "$sid" "$(_session_hash  "$params")"

local sid="$1" params="$2" out="$3";local key file ts now ttl;key="$(session_cache_key  "$sid"  "$params")" || return 1;file="${SESSION_CACHE_DIR%/}/${key}.cache";if [ ! -f "$file" ]; then return 1; fi;read -r ts < "$file" 2>/dev/null || ts=0;now="$(date +%s)";if [ "$now" -ge "$ts" ]; then rm -f "$file" 2>/dev/null || true;return 1;fi;if [ -n "$out" ]; then tail -n +2 "$file" > "$out" 2>/dev/null || return 1;else tail -n +2 "$file" 2>/dev/null || return 0;fi;return 0

local sid="$1" params="$2" ttl="${3:-300}" infile="$4";local key file expiry now;key="$(session_cache_key  "$sid"  "$params")" || return 1;file="${SESSION_CACHE_DIR%/}/${key}.cache";now="$(date +%s)";expiry=$((now + (ttl + 0)));{ printf '%s\n' "$expiry";if [ -n "$infile" ] && [ -f "$infile" ]; then cat "$infile";else cat -;fi; } > "$(_tmpf file  "${SESSION_CACHE_DIR%/}" session.cache 2>/dev/null)" || return 1;mv -f "$(_tmpf file  "${SESSION_CACHE_DIR%/}" session.cache 2>/dev/null)" "$file" 2>/dev/null || { rm -f "$(_tmpf file  "${SESSION_CACHE_DIR%/}" session.cache 2>/dev/null)" 2>/dev/null || true;return 1; };chmod 600 "$file" 2>/dev/null || true;return 0

local sid="$1" params="$2" key pattern;if [ -z "$sid" ]; then return 1; fi;if [ -n "$params" ]; then key="$(session_cache_key  "$sid"  "$params")" || return 1;rm -f "${SESSION_CACHE_DIR%/}/${key}.cache" 2>/dev/null || true;else pattern="${SESSION_CACHE_DIR%/}/${sid}|*.cache";for f in ${pattern}; do [ -e "$f" ] && rm -f -- "$f" 2>/dev/null || true;done;fi;return 0
local var val;for var in ALLOW_API_CALLS DRY_RUN DEBUG; do val="${!var:-}";if [ -n "$val" ]; then if is_truthy "$val"; then export "$var"=1;else export "$var"=0;fi;fi;done

blocks.body: if type ensure_config_dir >/dev/null 2>&1; then ensure_config_dir >/dev/null 2>&1 || true;else mkdir -p "${GROQBASH_CONFIG_DIR%/}" 2>/dev/null || true;fi

if [ "${GROQBASH_SOURCE_ONLY:-0}" -eq 0 ]; then if ! ensure_run_tmpdir >/dev/null 2>&1; then log_error "TMP" "cannot create or access RUN_TMPDIR ($GROQBASH_TMPDIR). Aborting.";exit "$GROQBASHERRTMP";fi;fi
